hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "[PLUGIN-HOOK SessionStart] ROOT=[$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT] DATA=[$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA] PROJECT=[$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR] OPT_HELLO=[$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_HELLO_MESSAGE] ENTRY=[$CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT] HOST=[$(hostname)]"'
bash -c 'echo "[PLUGIN-HOOK PreToolUse] ROOT=[$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT] DATA=[$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA] PROJECT=[$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR] HOST=[$(hostname)]"'
